description_long: This object consists of three pumpkins arranged on two square concrete tiles. The two larger pumpkins are intricately carved with expressive faces: one has a wide, jagged grin and triangular eyes, while the other features a lopsided mouth with a protruding tongue and large, round eyes. Between them lies a smaller, partially decayed pumpkin or gourd, adding to the Halloween-themed display. The pumpkins have visible stems and their surfaces show natural ridges and some blemishes, typical of real pumpkins. The interior of the carved pumpkins is hollow, with jagged edges around the cutouts, and the overall color palette is dominated by shades of orange and yellow. The concrete tiles beneath provide a stable, urban setting, suggesting placement on a sidewalk or patio.
description: A group of three pumpkins, two of which are carved with expressive faces, arranged on concrete tiles. The display features detailed carving, visible stems, and a Halloween theme.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large carved pumpkins with expressive faces and a smaller gourd between them, all placed on concrete tiles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the uncarved back of the largest pumpkin and the concrete tile base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of all three pumpkins, with no visible carvings and the stems prominent.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the profile of the carved faces, especially the pumpkin with the protruding tongue.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional Halloween style with expressive, exaggerated facial features: one pumpkin has a wide, jagged grin and triangular eyes, while the other has a large, round eye cutouts, a lopsided mouth with a protruding tongue, and visible teeth. The carving is detailed and playful, emphasizing character and emotion.
